frontier.hypothesis: A per-file cc1 flag (documented but untested lever from prior sessions' live frontier) shifts sched2's rank_for_schedule INSN_LUID tie-break at T-14 between insns 106 and 117 without perturbing byte-identical build for other functions in system.c.
frontier.mechanism: s6/s15/s17 CONFIRMED the T-14 tie is decided by INSN_LUID from sched2's own backward walk. GCC 2.7.2 -f flags governing scheduler passes (-fno-schedule-insns2, -fno-cse-follow-jumps, -fno-move-loop-invariants, -fno-thread-jumps) could shift the LUID landscape. Any flag that alters rank_for_schedule's forward/backward walk seed OR alters sched2's tie-break priority ordering is a per-file compile-flag lever, a genuine new axis not yet catalogued.
frontier.next_probe: Forensics session: (a) enumerate GCC 2.7.2 -f/-fno-* flags via `tools/gcc-2.7.2/build/cc1 --help`; (b) write a per-file cc1 wrapper shim in tmp/ that applies the flag ONLY to system.c compilation; (c) measure sandbox under each candidate flag with candidate.c spliced; (d) verify no other function in system.c regresses. Flags passing both gates are per-file compile-flag levers.

frontier.mechanism: Twin's simpler landscape (no idx_1496, no double-check, single mask) isolates the register-web exchange without marionation_Exec's outer-flow/label-alive/alias-merge coupling. Judge-constraints ledger names the twin as the cheaper problem whose ip/g3 residual is the pair-window register exchange alone.

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair).
